title: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - 211info
text: MADRAS MEDICAL GROUP GENERAL MEDICAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a full range of primary care services including care of men, women, and children. Offers maternity care, women's health, occupational health care in addition to the diagnosis and management of acute and chronic problems. 76 NE 12th Street Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 8am-1pm (by appointment) Email (541) 475-3874 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 475-3874 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, other private insurance or out of pocket payment. 20% discount offered to uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 8am-1pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on 12th Street, across from the St Charles Madras hospital Services: General Medical Care Prenatal Care Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - POSTPARTUM DEPRESSION OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - URGENT CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MADRAS MEDICAL GROUP
